prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（含物理类）最低位次依次约 22560→27613→41196→24309→59240，波动较大；2023 年因省控线变化及专业组调整出现大幅后移，2024 年有所回升，2025 年因新高考改革分专业组投档，护理学等冷门组拉低校线至约 59240 名，近 5 年整体呈后移趋势；该校在河南省理科/物理类计划数：2021 年 64 人、2022 年 63 人、2023 年 63 人、2024 年 63 人、2025 年 88 人；2026 年计划大幅增至 113 人，较 2025 年扩招约 28.4%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从 2021 年第 103 名持续上升至 2026 年第 63 名，排名提升明显，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力上升；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要原因系 2025 年录取季在河北、河南等地位次下滑超 500 名，中医学专业在黑龙江、吉林等省份出现断档，最低录取位次跌至二本线，可能对 2026 年报考心理产生滞后影响；抖音热度排名第 103，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于中等水平；第五轮；该校以中医学、中药学、针灸推拿学为传统优势方向，在中医药领域具有行业标杆地位。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中医学/临床医学类专业社会热度持续偏热至高热推荐，护理学专业因就业率高也被推荐；河南省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 120 万（含不确定标记），较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计约 90.7 万大幅增加约 32%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；2026 年。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次约 59240 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 28.4%（缓解竞争）、学校软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）、河南省考生规模大幅增加约 32%（加剧竞争）、以及 2025 年断档事件的滞后影响，扩招与考生增加两股力量相互对冲，但学校排名上升和声誉偏负面共同作用使竞争略趋激烈；预测 2026 年最低位次约 68838 名，区间 68338–69338 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 22560→27613→41196→24309→59240, with significant fluctuations; in 2023, due to changes in provincial control lines and adjustments in major groups, there was a substantial backward shift, which recovered somewhat in 2024; in 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform with separate major group filing, cold majors like nursing pulled the school line down to about 59240, showing an overall backward trend over the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Henan Province: 64 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 63 in 2024, 88 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly increases to 113, an expansion of about 28.4% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, showing a clear improvement in ranking, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a decline of over 500 places in Hebei, Henan and other regions during the 2025 admission season, with Chinese Medicine majors experiencing gaps in Heilongjiang, Jilin and other provinces, where the lowest admission ranking fell to the second-tier line, potentially having a lagging psychological impact on 2026 applications; Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average, with short video exposure at a medium level; fifth round; the university has traditional advantages in Chinese Medicine, Chinese Materia Medica, and Acupuncture and Tuina, holding an industry benchmark position in the field of traditional Chinese medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Medicine/Clinical Medicine majors have sustained social popularity ranging from hot to highly recommended, while Nursing is also recommended due to high employment rates; in 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (including uncertain markers), a significant increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of about 907,000 for physics and history categories in 2025, with the expanded candidate pool intensifying overall competition; 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 59240, a significant enrollment expansion of about 28.4% in 2026 (alleviating competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), a substantial increase of about 32% in the number of candidates in Henan Province (intensifying competition), and the lagging impact of the 2025 gap event, the forces of expansion and candidate increase offset each other, but the combined effect of rising school ranking and somewhat negative reputation makes competition slightly more intense; the predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is about 68838, with a range of 68338–69338.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 68338–69338, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (requiring a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range), and Tier 3 Nursing as a safety option; among Tier 1, the long-term Chinese Medicine programs are the most competitive, while in Tier 2, majors like Chinese Materia Medica, Pharmaceutical Administration, and Big Data Management and Application offer high cost-performance and can be prioritized.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were approximately 2250→1750→2600→1661→2608, fluctuating within the range of 1661–2608. In 2024, it reached the best in recent years (1661st), and in 2025, it rose back to 2608th, showing a backward trend in the past two years. The university's planned enrollment in Henan Province for liberal arts/history category: 5 students each year from 2021 to 2025; in 2026, the plan increases to 7 students, a 40% expansion compared to 2025, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science University Ranking has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, reflecting a significant improvement in the university's comprehensive strength and increasing attractiveness to liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to the decline in rankings in Hebei, Henan, and other regions during the 2025 admission season, and the gap in Chinese medicine majors in some provinces, which may have a lagging effect on the 2026 application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average. The fifth round; the university's Chinese medicine disciplines hold a benchmark position in the industry, attracting liberal arts candidates to apply for related majors.

专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Chinese medicine majors remains consistently high to highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million (including uncertain marks), a significant increase of about 32% compared to the total of about 907,000 for physics and history categories in 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition. 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of approximately 2608th in 2025, a 40% enrollment expansion in 2026 (significantly alleviating competition), the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), a substantial increase of about 32% in the number of candidates in Henan Province (intensifying competition), and the lagging effect of the 2025 gap incident, the expansion rate (40%) is greater than the candidate growth rate (about 32%), so the overall competitive pressure is slightly alleviated. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3334th, with a range of 2834–3834.
